title: PI3Kδ inhibition alters CD8 T cell differentiation and reprograms the tumor microenvironment following adoptive immunotherapy.
snippet: T cell exhaustion remains a significant barrier to effective adoptive cell therapy in solid tumors. Here, we demonstrate that in vitro treatment with the PI3Kδ inhibitor CAL-101 generates T cells with enhanced stemness and metabolic fitness. These cells show increased mitochondrial dependence and spare respiratory capacity while maintaining normal bas...
